rejection_reasons: Original baseline: PF 0.207, expectancy -0.065, win rate 10.9% on DEVELOP sample (20240101-20240630)
V2 stricter variant: PF 0.011, expectancy -0.086, win rate 5.0% with only 20 trades
V2 reduced trades by 95% but did not improve signal quality
Negative expectancy across all pairs (LINK, BNB, LTC, XRP)
Entry hypothesis (shallow pullback reclaim in uptrends) does not produce positive expectancy
Reclaim logic too loose (allows EMA fast reclaim without pullback high reclaim)
RSI pullback range too broad (25-55 original, 27-52 V2)
Relative volume filter too weak (>= 1.0 original, >= 1.15 V2)
All exits via exit_signal (no proper stoploss/ROI risk management)
Parameter tuning unlikely to rescue structural weakness
notes: Template code retained in strategy_templates.py for learning/history purposes. The strategy mechanically executes correctly but the underlying hypothesis does not produce positive expectancy on the DEVELOP sample.
